title: ISO 9001 Quality Management System
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable quality workshop for applying ISO 9001 quality management system requirements at work.
whyThisMatters: ISO 9001 Quality Management System helps quality, operations, and process teams translate ISO 9001 quality management system into daily routines, evidence, and improvement habits. The session covers Documentation & Implementation Training, Learn through interactive workshops on techniques for reviewing procedures, and Understand ISO 9001 QMS Requirements so participants can support standards, audits, and process discipline with more confidence.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: Learn through interactive workshops on techniques for reviewing procedures

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
